sections.paragraph:
verb לסבך

to complicate, confuse; entangle

verb סובך

be complicated; entangled

verb להסתבך

become entangled; get into trouble; become involved

verb לסבך (>>סיבך)

to complicate, confuse; entangle

masculine noun

thicket, jungle, copse, mat, matt, shag, skein, brake, coppice; entanglement, complication, labyrinth, intricacy, snarl
